summary: FINAL VERIFICATION COMPLETE - All features working correctly after UI bug fix. Fixed 2 backend bugs during testing (timezone import, MongoDB ObjectId serialization). All 7 test cases passed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_AllFields_1775309376 tenant with all new fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: (1) Admin login - email/password only, no phone fields, (2) Super admin login redirects to /super-admin, (3) Tenant creation with all 6 fields working, (4) Email OTP login working (MOCKED), (5) Forgot password working (MOCKED), (6) /login route removed - redirects to home, (7) Tenant data saved correctly with new fields

test_results.test_1_admin_login_no_phone: PASS - Admin login page has only email/password fields, no phone
test_results.test_2_super_admin_login: PASS - Login with admin@hyperserve.com/admin123 redirects to /super-admin
test_results.test_3_tenant_creation_6_fields: PASS - Create tenant with name, business_type, business_name, mobile_number, address, town
test_results.test_4_email_otp_login: PASS - Email OTP login at /email-otp-login works (MOCKED OTP)
test_results.test_5_forgot_password: PASS - Forgot password at /forgot-password works (MOCKED OTP)
test_results.test_7_tenant_data_saved: PASS - All new fields saved correctly in database
